_comment: Required-status-checks set is intentionally narrow. Every entry MUST be a check that:
(a) is produced by a workflow with both `pull_request:` AND `merge_group:` triggers, AND
(b) actually reports a status with the same context name on the merge queue ref.
Empirically validated (Cogni-DAO/test-repo PR #53, 2026-04-28): GitHub's merge queue waits
FOREVER for required checks whose workflows lack a `merge_group:` trigger. CodeQL default-setup,
pr-lint.yaml, and similar PR-only workflows therefore CANNOT be in this list — the queue would
